sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-22 17:48
- Distance: 7.7 km
- Moving time: 41:30
- Elapsed time: 41:30
- Elevation gain: 73 m
- Average heart rate: 172.8 bpm
- Max heart rate: 186 bpm
- Average watts: 231.6 W
- Average speed: 11.2 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `174.1 bpm`, ranging from `161.7` to `182.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `173.5 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `183.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `179.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `170.0 spm` (-9.2 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:22 /km` across `7.733 km` in `41:30` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:18 /km` and second-half pace was `5:25 /km` (+7 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.8 bpm` average and `186 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `165.7 bpm` in the first half and `180.1 bpm` in the second (+14.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `41:30` out of `41:30` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `1` stop segment and `0.1%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `90.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.6 m` and `16.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `40.8 m` in the first half and `49.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
